---
title: "stat443-project-arimax"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-09"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(forecast)
library(zoo)
library(ggplot2)
```



```{r prepare_data}
df <- read_csv(file = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ShahrukhP15/Time-Series-Forecasting-of-U.S.-Fuel-Price-Spreads/refs/heads/main/PET_PRI_GND_DCUS_NUS_W.csv", show_col_types=F) 

df <- df |>
  mutate(
    Date = as.Date(Date, format = "%m/%d/%Y"),
    gasoline = A1,
    diesel = D1,
    spread = gasoline - diesel
  ) |>
  arrange(Date) |>
  select(Date, gasoline, diesel, spread)


heatingoil <- read.csv("heatingoil.csv")
crudeoil <- read.csv("oilprices.csv")

df_heat <- merge(x=df, y=heatingoil, by="Date", all.x=T)

# resolve issues with some dates having missing data - fill in with the 
# price of the nearest (preceding) day with data

df_heat$heating_oil[1] <- df_heat$heating_oil[2]

for (i in 2:nrow(df_heat)) {
  if (is.na(df_heat$heating_oil[i])) {
    df_heat$heating_oil[i] = df_heat$heating_oil[i-1]
  }
}

for (i in 1:nrow(crudeoil)) {
  if (is.na(crudeoil[i,2])) {
    crudeoil[i,2] = crudeoil[i-1,2]
  }
}

crudeoil <- crudeoil |>
  rename(Date=observation_date, crude_oil=DCOILWTICO) |>
  mutate(crude_oil = replace(crude_oil, crude_oil <= 0, 0.01))

df_all <- merge(x=df_heat, y=crudeoil, by="Date")
```


```{r rmse_functions}
# source: adapted from unemploy-gdp-armax.Rmd
armax_fc = function(tsdata,ntrain,order,method="ML",traincoef,
                    include.mean=TRUE,xreg) {
  obj = arima(tsdata,order=order,init=traincoef,fixed=traincoef,
     method=method, include.mean=include.mean, xreg=xreg,
     optim.control=list(maxit=0))
  # yt = y_{t|t-1} + innov ; fc = yt-innov 
  fc = tsdata - obj$residuals  
  ntotal = length(tsdata)
  holdout_fc = fc[(ntrain+1):ntotal]
  holdout = tsdata[(ntrain+1):ntotal]
  rmse = sqrt(mean((holdout-holdout_fc)^2))
  list(rmse=rmse, fc=holdout_fc)
}
```



```{r train_holdout}

# train/holdout split

ntrain <- 1257 # leaves 104 holdout (2 years)
y <- df$spread
n <- length(y)
nholdout <- n-ntrain
train_y <- y[1:ntrain]
holdout <- y[(ntrain+1):length(y)]

```


```{r ccf}
ccf(df_all$spread |> diff(), df_all$crude_oil |> diff())
ccf(df_all$spread |> diff(), df_all$heating_oil |> diff())

# for both crude and heating oil, the lag of -1 has the tallest bar, 
# suggesting that a lag of 1 may be the best
```


```{r lagoil}
df_all <- df_all |>
  mutate(
    crude_lag1 = lag(crude_oil, 1),
    heat_lag1 = lag(heating_oil, 1)
  )

  
df_all_lag1 <- df_all |>
  filter(!is.na(crude_lag1))
```


```{r heatingoil_reg}
reg_heatingoil <- lm(spread ~ heat_lag1, data=df_all_lag1[1:(ntrain-1),])

plot.ts(reg_heatingoil$residuals)

pred_reg_heatingoil <- predict(reg_heatingoil, newdata=df_all_lag1[ntrain:(n-1),])
rmse_reg_heatingoil <- sqrt(mean((holdout-pred_reg_heatingoil)^2))
cat("RMSE of reg_heatingoil:", rmse_reg_heatingoil, "\n")

resid_reg_heatingoil_auto <- auto.arima(reg_heatingoil$residuals)

summary(reg_heatingoil)
print(resid_reg_heatingoil_auto)

# auto.arima on residuals of reg_heatingoil suggests ARIMA(3,1,2)
```

```{r crudeoil_reg}
reg_crudeoil <- lm(spread ~ crude_oil, data=df_all_lag1[1:(ntrain-1),])

plot.ts(reg_crudeoil$residuals)

pred_reg_crudeoil <- predict(reg_crudeoil, newdata=df_all_lag1[ntrain:(n-1),])
rmse_reg_crudeoil <- sqrt(mean((holdout-pred_reg_crudeoil)^2))
cat("RMSE of reg_crudeoil:", rmse_reg_crudeoil, "\n")

resid_reg_crudeoil_auto <- auto.arima(reg_crudeoil$residuals)

summary(reg_crudeoil)
print(resid_reg_crudeoil_auto)

# auto.arima on residuals of reg_crudeoil suggests ARIMA(3,1,2)

```


```{r crudeheat_reg}
reg_crudeheat <- lm(spread ~ crude_lag1 + heat_lag1, data=df_all_lag1[1:(ntrain-1),])

plot.ts(reg_crudeheat$residuals)

pred_reg_crudeheat <- predict(reg_crudeheat, newdata=df_all_lag1[ntrain:(n-1),])
rmse_reg_crudeheat <- sqrt(mean((holdout-pred_reg_crudeheat)^2))
cat("RMSE of reg_crudeheat:", rmse_reg_crudeheat, "\n")

resid_reg_crudeheat_auto <- auto.arima(reg_crudeheat$residuals)

summary(reg_crudeheat)
print(resid_reg_crudeheat_auto)

# auto.arima on residuals of reg_crudeheat suggests ARIMA(2,0,2)

```





```{r lagoil}
df_all <- df_all |>
  mutate(
    crude_lag1 = lag(crude_oil, 1),
    heat_lag1 = lag(heating_oil, 1)
  )
  
df_all_lag1 <- df_all |>
  filter(!is.na(crude_lag1))
```


```{r arimax_search}
xregs <- list(
  heat_lag1 = as.matrix(df_all_lag1$heat_lag1),
  crude_lag1 = as.matrix(df_all_lag1$crude_lag1),
  crudeheat_lag1 = as.matrix(df_all_lag1 |> select(crude_lag1, heat_lag1))
)

orders <- list(
  c(3,1,2), c(2,0,2), c(4,1,3),
  c(3,1,1), c(3,0,2), c(3,1,3),
  c(3,0,3), c(2,0,3), c(2,0,1)
)

armax_results <- lapply(names(xregs), function(name) {
  xreg <- as.matrix(xregs[[name]])
  
  df <- data.frame()
  
  for (ord in orders) {
    fit <- arima(df_all_lag1$spread[1:(ntrain-1)], order = ord,
                 xreg = xreg[1:(ntrain-1), , drop = F], include.mean = T)
    
    fc <- armax_fc(tsdata = df_all_lag1$spread, ntrain = ntrain-1, 
                   order = ord, traincoef = fit$coef, xreg = xreg,
                   include.mean = T)
    
    z <- data.frame(Exogenous_Variable = paste0(name, " with ARIMA(", paste(ord, collapse = ","),
                                     ") on residuals"),
                    Holdout_RMSE = fc$rmse |> round(4))
    
    df <- bind_rows(df, z)
  }
  
  df
  
}) |> bind_rows() |> arrange(Holdout_RMSE)


print(armax_results)

```
